name: I hurt my back at work but had prior issues - will pre-existing condition hurt my claim?
description: No, if work aggravated it - prove with medical evidence.[4]

mainEntity.name: I hurt my back at work but had prior issues - will pre-existing condition hurt my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, if work aggravated it - prove with medical evidence.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah allows comp for aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work caused worsening.[4] Context: Must prove causal connection between job duties and new injury.[4] Key factors: Medical expert opinion key; usual exertions can qualify.[4] Practical guidance: Get doctor note linking work to aggravation; avoid gaps in treatment. Claims succeed with solid records. Consult specialist early.
